description: Settings profile name save and persist: verify that updating Full Name on /settings saves correctly, reflects in the form immediately after save, and persists after navigating away and back (real fix verification for defect #86)

steps.description: BROWSER RESET FIRST: Use browser_tabs to list open tabs; close all except one. Clear localStorage and cookies for app.phronex.com. Navigate to about:blank.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/auth/login. Log in as qa-test-journeyhawk@phronex.com with password HMqt4kH5loXkeAtvQSndQ7zNmow!Phx#9. Wait until URL no longer contains /auth/login.
Navigate to https://app.phronex.com/settings. Wait 2s for the page to load. Read the current value in the Full name input field and record it (this is the baseline name).

Clear the Full name input field and type a new unique test name: 'JH Verify Fix 86'. Click the 'Save profile' button. Wait up to 5s for a success message ('Profile updated.' or similar). Screenshot the success state. Verify: (a) success message appeared, (b) the Full name field now shows 'JH Verify Fix 86' (not the old name).
Navigate away: go to https://app.phronex.com/products. Wait 2s. Then navigate back to https://app.phronex.com/settings. Wait 2s for page to load. Read the current value in the Full name input field.

Screenshot the settings page. Report: (a) did the name save on first submission (pass/fail), (b) does the Full name field show 'JH Verify Fix 86' after navigating away and back (pass = fix verified / fail = still reverting), (c) any console errors observed.
